title: Keto Delight Dessert
description: A simple and delicious dessert recipe using silky keto delight ingredients. This dessert is perfect for keto dieters.
instructions: Line a baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the silky delight, blossom extract, and low carb sweetener.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
